---
title: "Anomalies_Post_Defense"
author: "Penny Hunter"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---

# Setup packages
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("~/Desktop/ASCI-GitHub/Masters-Thesis/setup.R")
```

#Load soil moisture data
```{r}
# Function to load and combine soil moisture files for a given folder
load_ldas_data <- function(folder_path) {
  all_files <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  files_to_load <- grep(
    pattern = "_19[8-9][0-9]\\.csv$|_200[0-9]\\.csv$|_201[0-8]\\.csv$",
    x = all_files,
    value = TRUE
  )
  df <- lapply(files_to_load, read.csv) |> dplyr::bind_rows()
  return(df)
}

folder_0_10   <- "input_data/LDAS_SM_0_10"
folder_10_40  <- "input_data/LDAS_SM_10_40"
folder_40_100 <- "input_data/LDAS_SM_40_100"

ldas_sm_0_10   <- load_ldas_data(folder_0_10)
ldas_sm_10_40  <- load_ldas_data(folder_10_40)
ldas_sm_40_100 <- load_ldas_data(folder_40_100)
```

#Loading climate variable PRISM data
```{r}
ppt_county_full    <- readRDS("input_data/prism_data_full/ppt_county_full.rds")
tmin_county_full   <- readRDS("input_data/prism_data_full/tmin_county_full.rds")
tmax_county_full   <- readRDS("input_data/prism_data_full/tmax_county_full.rds")
vpdmin_county_full <- readRDS("input_data/prism_data_full/vpdmin_county_full.rds")
vpdmean_county_full <- readRDS("input_data/prism_data_full/vpdmean_county_full.rds")
vpdmax_county_full <- readRDS("input_data/prism_data_full/vpdmax_county_full.rds")
```

# Prep PRISM Datasets for Merge and add LDAS
```{r}
prism_datasets <- list(
  tmin_county_full,
  ppt_county_full,
  vpdmax_county_full,
  vpdmin_county_full,
  vpdmean_county_full
)
dataset_names <- c(
  "tmin_county_full",
  "ppt_county_full",
  "vpdmax_county_full",
  "vpdmin_county_full",
  "vpdmean_county_full"
)
cols_to_remove <- c("county_name", "county_count", "Year", "Month", "Day")

for (i in seq_along(prism_datasets)) {
  df <- prism_datasets[[i]]
  df <- df[, !(names(df) %in% cols_to_remove)]
  assign(dataset_names[i], df, envir = .GlobalEnv)
}

ldas_sm_0_10 <- ldas_sm_0_10 %>%
  mutate(
    time    = as.Date(time),
    GEOID   = stringr::str_pad(as.character(GEOID), width = 5, pad = "0"),
    SM_0_10 = var
  ) %>%
  select(GEOID, time, SM_0_10)

ldas_sm_10_40 <- ldas_sm_10_40 %>%
  mutate(
    time     = as.Date(time),
    GEOID    = stringr::str_pad(as.character(GEOID), width = 5, pad = "0"),
    SM_10_40 = var
  ) %>%
  select(GEOID, time, SM_10_40)

ldas_sm_40_100 <- ldas_sm_40_100 %>%
  mutate(
    time      = as.Date(time),
    GEOID     = stringr::str_pad(as.character(GEOID), width = 5, pad = "0"),
    SM_40_100 = var
  ) %>%
  select(GEOID, time, SM_40_100)
```

# Merge PRISM Dataset with LDAS Dataset
```{r}
merged_prism_full <- tmax_county_full %>%
  full_join(tmin_county_full,   by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(ppt_county_full,    by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(vpdmax_county_full, by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(vpdmean_county_full,by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(vpdmin_county_full, by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(ldas_sm_0_10,       by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(ldas_sm_10_40,      by = c("time", "GEOID")) %>%
  full_join(ldas_sm_40_100,     by = c("time", "GEOID"))

merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full

rm(merged_prism_full, ppt_county_full, vpdmax_county_full, vpdmean_county_full,
   vpdmin_county_full, tmin_county_full, tmax_county_full,
   ldas_sm_0_10, ldas_sm_10_40, ldas_sm_40_100, prism_datasets, df)

saveRDS(merged_prism_full_1,
        "/Users/pennyhunter/Desktop/ASCI-GitHub/Masters-Thesis/input_data/merged_prism_full_1_wldas.RDS")
# merged_prism_full_1 <- readRDS("input_data/merged_prism_full_1_wldas.RDS")  # use if loading from disk
```

```{r}
# Crop counties to match yield data
counties_combined   <- readRDS("input_data/counties_combined.rds")
merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% counties_combined$fips)
rm(counties_combined)
```

# Make anomalies relative to day-of-year climatology
```{r}
library(slider)

# --- Step 1: add day-of-year column ---
merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  mutate(doy = lubridate::yday(time))

# --- Step 2: compute raw DOY climatology (mean of each DOY across all years,
#             per county) ---
clim_vars <- c(
  "prism_vpdmax", "prism_vpdmin", "prism_vpdmean",
  "prism_ppt", "prism_tmax", "prism_tmin",
  "SM_0_10", "SM_10_40", "SM_40_100"
)

doy_clim <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  group_by(GEOID, doy) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(clim_vars),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                   .names = "clim_{.col}"),
            .groups = "drop")
#step 2.5 
# ---- Diagnose: do we need to smooth the DOY climatology? ----
library(ggplot2)

# Pick a few representative counties to inspect
sample_geoids <- sample(unique(doy_clim$GEOID), 6)

doy_clim %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% sample_geoids) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = doy, y = clim_prism_tmax)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ GEOID, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Raw DOY Climatology — Tmax (check for jaggedness)",
    x = "Day of Year",
    y = "Climatological Mean Tmax (°C)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA))

# --- Step 3: smooth each county's DOY climatology with a 31-day centred
#             running mean to remove sampling noise ---
doy_clim <- doy_clim %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  arrange(doy, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(across(
    starts_with("clim_"),
    ~ slide_dbl(.x,
                ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                .before = 7, .after = 7, .complete = FALSE)
  )) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- Step 4: join climatology back and compute anomalies ---
merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  left_join(doy_clim, by = c("GEOID", "doy")) %>%
  mutate(
    anomaly_vpdmax   = prism_vpdmax  - clim_prism_vpdmax,
    anomaly_vpdmin   = prism_vpdmin  - clim_prism_vpdmin,
    anomaly_vpdmean  = prism_vpdmean - clim_prism_vpdmean,
    anomaly_ppt      = prism_ppt     - clim_prism_ppt,
    anomaly_tmax     = prism_tmax    - clim_prism_tmax,
    anomaly_tmin     = prism_tmin    - clim_prism_tmin,
    anomaly_SM_0_10  = SM_0_10       - clim_SM_0_10,
    anomaly_SM_10_40 = SM_10_40      - clim_SM_10_40,
    anomaly_SM_40_100= SM_40_100     - clim_SM_40_100
  )

rm(doy_clim)
```

# Binary variable for hot days
```{r}
merged_prism_full_1$binary_30 <- ifelse(
  !is.na(merged_prism_full_1$prism_tmax) & merged_prism_full_1$prism_tmax >= 30, 1, 0
)
```

# KDD and GDD calculation
```{r}
kdd_threshold <- 30
gdd_base      <- 10
gdd_cap       <- 30

Tf <- 0.44 - 0.46 * sin((pi * seq(0.5, 23, 1)) / 12 + 0.9) +
      0.11 * sin((2 * pi * seq(0.5, 23, 1)) / 12 + 0.9)

calculate_kdd_vec <- function(T_max, T_min, thr, Tf) {
  hrlyT     <- T_max * Tf + T_min * (1 - Tf)
  daily_KDD <- sum(pmax(hrlyT - thr, 0)) / 24
  return(daily_KDD)
}

calculate_gdd_vec <- function(T_max, T_min, Tf, base = gdd_base, cap = gdd_cap) {
  if (T_min < base || T_max > cap) return(0)
  hrlyT     <- T_max * Tf + T_min * (1 - Tf)
  daily_GDD <- sum(pmax(hrlyT - base, 0)) / 24
  return(daily_GDD)
}

merged_prism_full_1$KDD <- mapply(
  calculate_kdd_vec,
  T_max    = merged_prism_full_1$prism_tmax,
  T_min    = merged_prism_full_1$prism_tmin,
  MoreArgs = list(thr = kdd_threshold, Tf = Tf)
)

merged_prism_full_1$GDD <- mapply(
  calculate_gdd_vec,
  T_max    = merged_prism_full_1$prism_tmax,
  T_min    = merged_prism_full_1$prism_tmin,
  MoreArgs = list(Tf = Tf)  # base and cap pulled from globals automatically
)

merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  mutate(year = lubridate::year(time)) %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  mutate(
    KDD_sum_yearly = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    GDD_sum_yearly = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Ensure GEOID has leading zeros and create state FIPS
merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  mutate(
    GEOID = stringr::str_pad(as.character(GEOID), width = 5, pad = "0"),
    state = substr(GEOID, 1, 2)
  )

saveRDS(merged_prism_full_1,
        "/Users/pennyhunter/Desktop/ASCI-GitHub/Masters-Thesis/input_data/merged_prism_full_1_wldas.RDS")
# merged_prism_full_1 <- readRDS("input_data/merged_prism_full_1_wldas.RDS")  # use if loading from disk
```

```{r}
# ======================================================
# STATE–YEAR BLOCK BOOTSTRAP (1000 REPS)
# ======================================================
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)

setDT(merged_prism_full_1)
merged_prism_full_1[, time  := as.Date(time)]
merged_prism_full_1[, GEOID := sprintf("%05s", GEOID)]
merged_prism_full_1[, state := substr(GEOID, 1, 2)]

merged_all <- merged_prism_full_1

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Hot days
# ------------------------------------------------------
hot_days <- merged_all[binary_30 == 1, .(
  GEOID,
  state,
  day0_date = time,
  KDD
)]
hot_days[, year := year(day0_date)]

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Variables
# ------------------------------------------------------
anomaly_vars <- c(
  "anomaly_tmax",
  "anomaly_vpdmax",
  "anomaly_vpdmean",
  "anomaly_vpdmin",
  "anomaly_ppt",
  "anomaly_SM_0_10",
  "anomaly_SM_10_40",
  "anomaly_SM_40_100"
)

day_offsets <- -30:30
n_boot      <- 1000
set.seed(123)

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Define state-year blocks
# ------------------------------------------------------
unique_state_year <- unique(hot_days[, .(state, year)])
all_results       <- list()

# ======================================================
# MAIN BOOTSTRAP LOOP
# ======================================================
for (var in anomaly_vars) {
  cat("\nProcessing", var, "\n")

  anomaly_lookup <- merged_all[, .(
    GEOID,
    time,
    anomaly_value = get(var)
  )]

  bootstrap_mat <- matrix(
    NA_real_, nrow = n_boot, ncol = length(day_offsets)
  )
  colnames(bootstrap_mat) <- paste0("d", day_offsets)

  for (i in 1:n_boot) {
    if (i %% 50 == 0) cat(" Bootstrap", i, "of", n_boot, "\n")

    # State-year block bootstrap with replacement
    sampled_blocks <- unique_state_year[sample(.N, replace = TRUE)]

    hot_sample <- rbindlist(lapply(1:nrow(sampled_blocks), function(j) {
      hot_days[
        state == sampled_blocks$state[j] &
        year  == sampled_blocks$year[j]
      ]
    }))

    boot_windows <- hot_sample[
      , .(offset = day_offsets), by = .(GEOID, day0_date, KDD)
    ]
    boot_windows[, window_date := day0_date + offset]

    boot_window_data <- merge(
      boot_windows,
      anomaly_lookup,
      by.x = c("GEOID", "window_date"),
      by.y = c("GEOID", "time"),
      all.x = TRUE
    )

    boot_window_data[, weighted_anomaly := anomaly_value * KDD]
    total_kdd <- sum(hot_sample$KDD, na.rm = TRUE)

    avg_by_offset <- boot_window_data[
      !is.na(weighted_anomaly),
      .(avg = sum(weighted_anomaly, na.rm = TRUE) / total_kdd),
      by = offset
    ]
    setkey(avg_by_offset, offset)

    bootstrap_mat[i, match(avg_by_offset$offset, day_offsets)] <-
      avg_by_offset$avg
  }

  boot_summary <- data.table(
    variable = var,
    day      = day_offsets,
    mean     = colMeans(bootstrap_mat, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower    = apply(bootstrap_mat, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper    = apply(bootstrap_mat, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  all_results[[var]] <- boot_summary
}

all_boot <- rbindlist(all_results)

# ======================================================
# PLOTTING
# ======================================================
pretty_names <- c(
  "anomaly_SM_0_10"    = "Soil Moisture 0–10 cm (m³/m³)",
  "anomaly_SM_10_40"   = "Soil Moisture 10–40 cm (m³/m³)",
  "anomaly_SM_40_100"  = "Soil Moisture 40–100 cm (m³/m³)",
  "anomaly_tmax"       = "Max Temperature (°C)",
  "anomaly_vpdmean"    = "VPD Mean (hPa)",
  "anomaly_vpdmin"     = "VPD Minimum (hPa)",
  "anomaly_vpdmax"     = "VPD Maximum (hPa)",
  "anomaly_ppt"        = "Precipitation (mm)"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Shared y-axis limits for soil moisture panels
# ------------------------------------------------------
sm_vars <- c("anomaly_SM_0_10", "anomaly_SM_10_40", "anomaly_SM_40_100")
sm_data <- all_boot[variable %in% sm_vars]
sm_ylim <- c(min(sm_data$lower, na.rm = TRUE), max(sm_data$upper, na.rm = TRUE))

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: single-variable plot
# ------------------------------------------------------
make_plot <- function(var, ylim_fixed = NULL) {
  dat <- all_boot[variable == var]

  p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = day)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted",
               color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                fill = "#8FBC8F", alpha = 0.45) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean), color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 1.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
               color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = pretty_names[var],
      x     = expression(bold("Days from Hot Day")),
      y     = expression(bold("Anomaly"))
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title   = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      axis.text    = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))

  if (!is.null(ylim_fixed)) p <- p + coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim_fixed)
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Save each variable separately
# ------------------------------------------------------
non_sm_vars <- setdiff(names(pretty_names), sm_vars)

for (var in non_sm_vars) {
  p     <- make_plot(var)
  fname <- paste0("output_data/", var, "_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png")
  ggsave(fname, p, width = 7.5, height = 4, dpi = 600, units = "in")
  cat("Saved:", fname, "\n")
}

for (var in sm_vars) {
  p     <- make_plot(var, ylim_fixed = sm_ylim)
  fname <- paste0("output_data/", var, "_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png")
  ggsave(fname, p, width = 7.5, height = 4, dpi = 600, units = "in")
  cat("Saved:", fname, "\n")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Combined all-variable panel
# ------------------------------------------------------
p_all <- ggplot(all_boot, aes(x = day)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted",
             color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              fill = "#8FBC8F", alpha = 0.45) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean), color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable,
             scales   = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(variable = pretty_names),
             ncol     = 2) +
  labs(
    x = expression(bold("Days from Hot Day")),
    y = expression(bold("Anomaly"))
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    panel.grid   = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))

print(p_all)
ggsave("output_data/ALL_VARIABLES_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png",
       p_all, width = 7.5, height = 10, dpi = 600, units = "in")
cat("Saved: ALL_VARIABLES_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png\n")

saveRDS(all_boot, "/Users/pennyhunter/Desktop/ASCI-GitHub/Masters-Thesis/output_data/all_boot_STATE_YEAR.RDS")
```


```{r}
#better plot for SM 
# ======================================================
# REPLOT FROM all_boot — NO RE-RUNNING BOOTSTRAP
# ======================================================
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

pretty_names <- c(
  "anomaly_SM_0_10"    = "Soil Moisture 0–10 cm (m³/m³)",
  "anomaly_SM_10_40"   = "Soil Moisture 10–40 cm (m³/m³)",
  "anomaly_SM_40_100"  = "Soil Moisture 40–100 cm (m³/m³)",
  "anomaly_tmax"       = "Max Temperature (°C)",
  "anomaly_vpdmean"    = "VPD Mean (hPa)",
  "anomaly_vpdmin"     = "VPD Minimum (hPa)",
  "anomaly_vpdmax"     = "VPD Maximum (hPa)",
  "anomaly_ppt"        = "Precipitation (mm)"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Shared y-axis limits across ALL three SM panels
# ------------------------------------------------------
sm_vars     <- c("anomaly_SM_0_10", "anomaly_SM_10_40", "anomaly_SM_40_100")
all_boot_dt <- as.data.table(all_boot)
sm_data     <- all_boot_dt[variable %in% sm_vars]
sm_ylim     <- c(min(sm_data$lower, na.rm = TRUE), max(sm_data$upper, na.rm = TRUE))

cat("Shared SM y-axis limits:", sm_ylim, "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: single-variable plot
# ------------------------------------------------------
make_plot <- function(var, ylim_fixed = NULL, show_x_axis = FALSE) {
  dat <- all_boot_dt[variable == var]

  p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = day)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted",
               color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                fill = "#8FBC8F", alpha = 0.45) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean), color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 1.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
               color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = pretty_names[var],
      x     = if (show_x_axis) expression(bold("Days from Hot Day")) else NULL,
      y     = expression(bold("Anomaly"))
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title   = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      axis.text    = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.title.x = if (!show_x_axis) element_blank() else element_text(size = 11, face = "bold")
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))

  if (!is.null(ylim_fixed)) {
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(limits = ylim_fixed)
  }

  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Save each variable separately
# ------------------------------------------------------
non_sm_vars <- setdiff(names(pretty_names), sm_vars)

for (var in non_sm_vars) {
  p     <- make_plot(var, show_x_axis = TRUE)
  fname <- paste0("output_data/", var, "_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png")
  ggsave(fname, p, width = 7.5, height = 4, dpi = 600, units = "in")
  cat("Saved:", fname, "\n")
}

for (var in sm_vars) {
  p     <- make_plot(var, ylim_fixed = sm_ylim, show_x_axis = TRUE)
  fname <- paste0("output_data/", var, "_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png")
  ggsave(fname, p, width = 7.5, height = 4, dpi = 600, units = "in")
  cat("Saved:", fname, "\n")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Combined all-variable panel using patchwork
# so SM panels can share a y-axis while others are free
# ------------------------------------------------------

# Define plot order to match 2-column layout
plot_order <- c(
  "anomaly_ppt",       "anomaly_SM_0_10",
  "anomaly_SM_10_40",  "anomaly_SM_40_100",
  "anomaly_tmax",      "anomaly_vpdmax",
  "anomaly_vpdmean",   "anomaly_vpdmin"
)

# Which rows are the bottom row (need x-axis label)
bottom_row_vars <- c("anomaly_vpdmean", "anomaly_vpdmin")

plot_list <- lapply(plot_order, function(var) {
  is_sm      <- var %in% sm_vars
  is_bottom  <- var %in% bottom_row_vars
  make_plot(
    var,
    ylim_fixed   = if (is_sm) sm_ylim else NULL,
    show_x_axis  = is_bottom
  )
})

p_all <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 2)

print(p_all)
ggsave("output_data/ALL_VARIABLES_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png",
       p_all, width = 7.5, height = 10, dpi = 600, units = "in")
cat("Saved: ALL_VARIABLES_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png\n")
```

```{r}
#better plot 2.0
all_boot <- all_boot_STATE_YEAR
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Variable metadata: name and unit for y-axis labels
# ------------------------------------------------------
var_meta <- list(
  anomaly_ppt        = list(label = "Precipitation Anomaly (mm)"),
  anomaly_SM_0_10    = list(label = "Soil Moisture 0–10 cm Anomaly (m³/m³)"),
  anomaly_SM_10_40   = list(label = "Soil Moisture 10–40 cm Anomaly (m³/m³)"),
  anomaly_SM_40_100  = list(label = "Soil Moisture 40–100 cm Anomaly (m³/m³)"),
  anomaly_tmax       = list(label = "Max Temperature Anomaly (°C)"),
  anomaly_vpdmax     = list(label = "VPD Maximum Anomaly (hPa)")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Shared y-axis limits across ALL three SM panels
# ------------------------------------------------------
sm_vars     <- c("anomaly_SM_0_10", "anomaly_SM_10_40", "anomaly_SM_40_100")
all_boot_dt <- as.data.table(all_boot)
sm_data     <- all_boot_dt[variable %in% sm_vars]
sm_ylim     <- c(min(sm_data$lower, na.rm = TRUE), max(sm_data$upper, na.rm = TRUE))

cat("Shared SM y-axis limits:", sm_ylim, "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Plot order (VPD min and mean removed)
# ------------------------------------------------------
plot_order <- c(
  "anomaly_ppt",      "anomaly_SM_0_10",
  "anomaly_SM_10_40", "anomaly_SM_40_100",
  "anomaly_tmax",     "anomaly_vpdmax"
)

# Assign letters a–f
plot_letters <- letters[seq_along(plot_order)]
names(plot_letters) <- plot_order

# Bottom row variables (need x-axis label)
bottom_row_vars <- c("anomaly_tmax", "anomaly_vpdmax")

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: single-variable plot
# ------------------------------------------------------
make_plot <- function(var, letter, ylim_fixed = NULL, show_x_axis = FALSE) {
  dat    <- all_boot_dt[variable == var]
  ylabel <- var_meta[[var]]$label

  p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = day)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted",
               color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                fill = "#8FBC8F", alpha = 0.45) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean), color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 1.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
               color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = letter,
      x     = if (show_x_axis) expression(bold("Days from Hot Day")) else NULL,
      y     = ylabel
    ) +
    theme(
  panel.grid   = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
  plot.title   = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
  axis.text    = element_text(size = 9),
  axis.title.x = if (!show_x_axis) element_blank() else element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  
  # ADD THESE for tick marks
  axis.ticks        = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4),
  axis.ticks.length = unit(3, "pt")
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))

  if (!is.null(ylim_fixed)) {
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(limits = ylim_fixed)
  }

  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Save each variable separately
# ------------------------------------------------------
for (var in plot_order) {
  letter <- plot_letters[var]
  is_sm  <- var %in% sm_vars
  p      <- make_plot(var, letter,
                      ylim_fixed  = if (is_sm) sm_ylim else NULL,
                      show_x_axis = TRUE)
  fname  <- paste0("output_data/", var, "_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png")
  ggsave(fname, p, width = 7.5, height = 4, dpi = 600, units = "in")
  cat("Saved:", fname, "\n")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------
# Combined panel
# ------------------------------------------------------
plot_list <- lapply(plot_order, function(var) {
  letter    <- plot_letters[var]
  is_sm     <- var %in% sm_vars
  is_bottom <- var %in% bottom_row_vars
  make_plot(
    var,
    letter,
    ylim_fixed  = if (is_sm) sm_ylim else NULL,
    show_x_axis = is_bottom
  )
})

p_all <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 2)

print(p_all)
ggsave("output_data/ALL_VARIABLES_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png",
       p_all, width = 7.5, height = 10, dpi = 600, units = "in")
cat("Saved: ALL_VARIABLES_bootstrap_STATE_YEAR.png\n")
```
